description: A batch of incoming steering wheels from a supplier has failed a quality audit due to stitching defects.

nodes.task_description: Log the quality failure, including the part number, supplier, batch number, and reason for failure.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the failure of batch #8821 from 'SteerCo' for 'Inconsistent Stitching'.

nodes.task_description: Quarantine the entire batch of defective parts to prevent them from entering the assembly line.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the inventory system to place the batch on 'Quality Hold'.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier, inform them of the failure, and request a root cause analysis and a replacement shipment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent formally notifies the supplier and initiates the corrective action process.
